title: Poke Ball(精灵球)
description: Add Poke Ball to Catch Entity.
body:
# Poke Ball
## Description

This is a lightweight mod that adds a simple and intuitive way to interact with entities: the Capture Ball.

Craft a capture ball, throw it, and if it hits a creature, it captures it.

No complex systems, no extra mechanics—just a straightforward idea:
Throw it. Catch it.

## Features

Throwable Capture Mechanic
Use the ball like a projectile. Hitting an entity triggers the capture.

Entity Capturing
Capture most (or all, depending on your implementation) living entities in the world.

Entity Storage
Captured entities are stored inside the ball.

Simple Crafting
Easy to craft and use, with no learning curve.
![Poke Ball Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd3e63d90ec62512f17c18f4742df1eac82db51b.png)

## Why download this mod?

A New Way to Play
Go beyond killing or taming—now you can collect entities.

Simple but Fun
Minimal design that fits naturally into vanilla gameplay.

Highly Practical

Move villagers easily

Collect rare mobs

Manage your own entity collection
